basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) Teaching Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website svnit.ac.in. Teaching Assistant positions have been announced through the SVNIT Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 on a contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class or equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5/10) in M.Tech/M.E. and B.Tech/B.E. with Good Academic Record, Ph.D. with 1st Class or equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5/10) in B.Tech/B.E. and M.Tech/M.E. with Good Academic Record
qualification.details: For Teaching Assistant (M.Tech/M.E. Qualification): 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M. Tech./M.E. and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in B. Tech./B.E with Good Academic Record. For Teaching Assistant (Ph.D. Qualification): Ph. D. (in appropriate branch) with 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in B. Tech./B.E. and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M. Tech./M.E. with Good Academic Record.

salary_details.details: For Teaching Assistant (M.Tech/M.E. Qualified): Rs.45,000/- For Teaching Assistant (Ph.D. Qualified): Rs.60,000/-

selection_process: Registration Document Verification Written Test and/or Interview

_labels.notification_pdf: Download SVNIT Teaching Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download SVNIT Teaching Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.sardar_vallabhbhai_national_institute_of: 1st Class or equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5/10) in M.Tech/M.E. and B.Tech/B.E. with Good Academic Record, Ph.D. with 1st Class or equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5/10) in B.Tech/B.E. and M.Tech/M.E. with Good Academic Record

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Teaching Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SVNIT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SVNIT Teaching Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For Teaching Assistant (M.Tech/M.E. Qualification): 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M. Tech./M.E. and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in B. Tech./B.E with Good Academic Record. For Teaching Assistant (Ph.D. Qualification): Ph. D. (in appropriate branch) with 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in B. Tech./B.E. and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M. Tech./M.E. with Good Academic Record.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: For Teaching Assistant (M.Tech/M.E. Qualified): Rs.45,000/- For Teaching Assistant (Ph.D. Qualified): Rs.60,000/-

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Registration Document Verification Written Test and/or Interview

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for SVNIT Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT), a premier government institution located in Surat, Gujarat. It is a well-known institute for technical education.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Teaching Assistant. This role typically involves assisting faculty members with academic and research activities within the institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There are 0 total vacancies for the Teaching Assistant posts. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any updates or specific details regarding the number of positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Eligible candidates need to attend an interview directly at the specified venue and date with their required documents.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date for the Teaching Assistant position is 24 July 2026. Candidates must ensure they report on time with all necessary documents for registration and verification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a 1st Class or equivalent CGPA in M.Tech/M.E. and B.Tech/B.E. with a good academic record, or a Ph.D. with 1st Class or equivalent CGPA in B.Tech/B.E. and M.Tech/M.E. with a good academic record.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Teaching Assistant?
faq.answer: The salary for Teaching Assistant varies based on qualification. Candidates with M.Tech/M.E. will receive Rs.45,000/-, while Ph.D. holders will receive Rs.60,000/-. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the SVNIT Teaching Assistant Walk-in Interview 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process for Teaching Assistant includes registration, document verification, and a written test and/or interview. Candidates must clear all stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the SVNIT office in Surat, Gujarat. Candidates should check the official notification for the exact venue address and reporting time within the campus.
